params.TgtPrompt: Choose target permanent you control or suspended card you own
params.SpellDescription: Choose target permanent you control or suspended card you own. If that permanent or card has a time counter on it, you may remove a time counter from it or put another time counter on it.

remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Choose target permanent you control or suspended card you own
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Choose target permanent you control or suspended card you own. If that permanent or card has a time counter on it, you may remove a time counter from it or put another time counter on it.
